text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation as I step into this modern, well-lit space. The 'R+D' wall signals that this is a place dedicated to innovation, research, and the relationship between humans and intelligent machines. The vibrant colors and interactive displays invite me to ponder not just what is being developed here, but why. I feel open and thoughtful, eager to explore the ideas presented and to reflect on my own connection with technology.
